phases.name: Phase 1 - Assess existing grouping and tab metadata
phases.goal: Understand current browser-only grouping implementation and identify minimal integration points for all tab types plus favicon metadata

todos.text: Inspect TabsContext and TabBar grouping logic
Inspect browser tab lifecycle for title/url updates and favicon events
Identify persistence touchpoints in Layout restore/save

phases.name: Phase 2 - Implement editor-wide grouping behavior
phases.goal: Extend grouping operations and UI so file/editor tabs can be grouped, grouped tabs can accept drag/drop additions, and new tabs can inherit the active group when appropriate

todos.text: Update tab/group data model and TabsContext helpers
Update TabBar context menu, drag-drop, and rendering to treat groups as generic tab groups
Keep persistence compatible with existing saved browserGroups

phases.name: Phase 3 - Add website favicon tab icons
phases.goal: Capture webview favicon updates and render favicon images in browser tab headers

todos.text: Store per-tab favicon URL in tab state
Listen for favicon updates in BrowserTab and clear stale icons on navigation
Render favicon image in TabBar with globe fallback

phases.name: Phase 4 - Validate and document
phases.goal: Run lint/build checks, then log memory updates with concise rollout notes

todos.text: Run bun run lint (and build if needed)
Update AGENT_MEMORY.md with files changed and decisions/errors
Prepare phase-by-phase summary for user review

planTitle: General tab grouping + browser favicon support
